coordination_en: At the launch of training on the zonal approach, the INSP Director-General called on the 17 Health Zone Medical Chiefs of the Bunia office and their Community Animators to actively involve themselves in EVD response activities. Organisation of training for all health zone medical chiefs of Ituri province on the functioning of an IMS and the zonal approach for this response (60 participants: INSP/COUSP-RDC, DPS and HZ framework teams). Continued support to affected provinces under the leadership of the IM and IMS members based in Bunia. Visit of CME and Rwampara ETCs by the DG of Alima, guided by the INSP DG and COUSP Coordinator.

Organisation of training for all health zone medical chiefs of Ituri"}
